name: Strawberry Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
------------------------ Cream Filling------------------------------------
2 tbsp cornstarch
1/4 tsp salt
1/4 cup sugar
3 tbsp flour
2 cups milk
1 egg, slightly beaten
1/2 cup whipping cream, whipped
1 tsp vanilla
--------------------------Fresh strawberries Glaze--------------------------
1/2 cup fresh strawberries
1/2 cup water
2 tsp cornstarch
1/4 cup sugar
DIRECTIONS FOR CREAM FILLING:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Mix the first four ingredients in a bowl. Gradually stir in milk, constantly stirring until thickened. Stir some of the hot mixture into the egg; return to remaining hot mixture. Bring to a boil and continue cooking, stirring frequently. Let cool before refrigerating.
DIRECTIONS FOR PIE:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Toast almonds until lightly browned, then sprinkle over the bottom of the cooled pie crust. Fill the crust with chilled cream filling. Halve 2 cups of strawberries and place atop the filling.
DIRECTIONS FOR GLAZE:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Crush half a cup of berries; add water; cook for 2 minutes; strain. Mix sugar and cornstarch, then gradually stir into berry juice. Cook until thick and clear, stirring frequently. Let cool slightly before pouring over halved strawberries. Keep refrigerated until serving time.
